name: stacksketch-cli
description: Zero-config architecture maps for any codebase.
author: StackSketch contributors

scripts.check: node --check src/analyzer.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/defaults.js && node --check src/renderers.js && node --check src/utils.js && node --check tests/analyzer.test.js && node --check tests/cli.test.js && node --check tests/renderers.test.js
scripts.prepack: npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke
